gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants and updated the daily app metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and README up-to-date with the latest usage metrics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: Since this is an automated bot task updating the 'greenhouse' (app metrics), depicting the Robot companion watering plants alongside Polly the bee fits perfectly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse, while the cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Chunky sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse, while the cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
